## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO, and AI-related initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/yd2uyCnBytD2rt3goGsPce7EKMCC_5A7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New director (Megan) joining next week; Mara transitioning off](https://fathom.video/share/yd2uyCnBytD2rt3goGsPce7EKMCC_5A7?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Implementing new design firm for HTML templates to increase volume and quality](https://fathom.video/share/yd2uyCnBytD2rt3goGsPce7EKMCC_5A7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Shifting focus to create authoritative content on AI answering and call center mechanics](https://fathom.video/share/yd2uyCnBytD2rt3goGsPce7EKMCC_5A7?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
